title: RadioImmuno Assay (RIA) Protocol
author: Peter Havel
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.yv8fw9w
materials: Follow kit instructions for preparing standards and all reagents.

steps.title: Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times
steps.instruction: Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Pipet standards and samples . Pipet antibody and tracer. Incubate.

steps.title: Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times
steps.instruction: Follow kit instructions for volumes and incubation times. Add precipitating reagent. Incubate.
